sources.title: Premed Knowledge Graph
sources.locator: Sections 2, 3, 5.1, and 6; canonical dataset site/data/premed-graph.json keys schema.routeResolutionRule, schema.requirementLegend, and metrics.routeTopicCounts

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The lesson independently organizes and expresses the graph's data contract, node and link semantics, route rule, and scope boundaries; it copies no source examples, tables, prose sequence, or media.

agentAccess.notes: The agent used the operator-provided local repository checkout. The repository's content license expressly covers course/ and site/data/, and no source-specific restriction on agent processing was found in the applicable project policies.
